creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
When trying to add ports search to Firefox it says that: https://www.freebsd.org/search/opensearch/ports.xml has not been found:

> $ fetch https://www.freebsd.org/search/opensearch/ports.xml
> fetch: https://www.freebsd.org/search/opensearch/ports.xml: Not Found
